step2.ptxt: Check that the key reminder warning buzzer sounds.

step3.ptxt: With the driver's side door closed, insert the key into the ignition key cylinder and then turn the key to the LOCK or ACC position.
Check that the buzzer sounds intermittently if the driver's side door is opened.

step2.ptxt: Check that the key reminder warning buzzer stops.

step3.ptxt: Check that the buzzer stops sounding if any of the following operations is performed while the buzzer is sounding:

item.ptxt: Close the driver's side door (front door courtesy light switch is off).
Turn the ignition switch to the ON position.
Pull out the key from the ignition key cylinder.
